channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The Mystery of IT: A Gap in Understanding for Business Executives
item.description: The mystery of IT people and processes remains a challenge for business executives to grasp. CIOs must humanize IT by attaching faces to the various aspects of the IT service factory, and use language that is easily understood by non-IT professionals.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
